standard: A product is complete only when catalog, route, API, database, admin, commercial CTA, fulfilment, runtime truth, smoke status, and tests agree.
quarterlyEditionPolicy: Quarterly intelligence products, including GMI, must be edition-parametric. Q2 records may seed or publish Q2, but runtime, tests, APIs, and reports must support future editions without Q2-only hardcoding.

ladder.purpose: Turn a pressure point into a board-ready diagnosis.
Resolve the decision under guided strategic pressure.
Convert decision findings into executive-grade reporting.
Continuity layer for ongoing access, tools, and intelligence.
Accountable market intelligence instrument that feeds diagnosis and executive judgement.
Specialist tools that support Strategy Room, not headline replacement offers.

products.commercialNextStep: Route pressure result to Boardroom Brief or Strategy Room based on band.
knownBlockers: Product estate currently points to /decision-pressure while the DB-backed route is /pressure.
/decision-pressure computes client-side and competes with /pressure.
products.runtimeTruth: DB-derived via /api/pressure/signal and PressureSignalEvent on the /pressure route.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Use /pressure as the canonical acquisition route; keep /decision-pressure only as redirected legacy surface or retire it.

products.commercialNextStep: Paid diagnosis, then qualified escalation into Strategy Room.
knownBlockers: Public preview is generated in-page before checkout.
Admin boardroom delivery generation imports lib/boardroom/boardroom-dev-spine.ts and can persist BoardroomDossier rows from fixture state.
Paid deliverable preview and durable delivery artifact need clearer separation.
products.runtimeTruth: Mixed persisted order/dossier state and generated preview state.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Orders, delivery state, dossier artifacts, hashes, and customer confirmation must be durable database/audit records.

products.commercialNextStep: Guided strategic pressure intervention after evidence qualification.
knownBlockers: Parallel pages/api and app/api ownership needs consolidation.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Strategy case state, intervention status, deliverables, and completion proof must persist in Strategy Room models.

products.commercialNextStep: Convert carried evidence into executive-grade report artifact.
knownBlockers: Two Stripe webhook surfaces exist and need canonical ownership.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Report source state, evidence completeness, generated artifacts, and delivery audit must persist.

products.commercialNextStep: Support Strategy Room by producing persistent run records and next recommended product.
knownBlockers: No dedicated instrument run authority model.
Instrument PDF route states no entitlement check.
Some start pages say purchase is confirmed without entitlement verification.
Some runs persist without user identity or fall back to weak Date.now identifiers.
Some runs continue when persistence fails.
Decision instrument price/catalog truth is duplicated across CATALOG, PRODUCT_ESTATE, product-catalogue-registry, and local page arrays.
products.runtimeTruth: Partly DB-derived through DiagnosticJourney; delivery authority incomplete.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Each instrument run must persist score/result, entitlement, artifact state, and next-route recommendation.

products.commercialNextStep: Continuity subscription distinct from dormant Inner Circle membership.
knownBlockers: Professional trial status is handled separately from active entitlement resolution.
products.runtimeTruth: DB-derived entitlement state with legacy Inner Circle bridge.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Professional is the canonical continuity subscription; Inner Circle remains a dormant/controlled operating layer.

products.commercialNextStep: Selective sales path after durable case history.
knownBlockers: Not self-serve active; public copy must stay selective/gated.
products.runtimeTruth: DB-derived contract/review queue state where active.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Monthly oversight record, intervention log, account health, drift, and client status must persist before broader activation.

products.commercialNextStep: Controlled operating layer; do not sell as passive subscription archive.
knownBlockers: Catalog marks Inner Circle inactive; route surface remains substantial.
Membership CTA must not imply active paid subscription.
products.runtimeTruth: DB-derived operating profile, worksheet, and advisory qualification state.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Inner Circle is an operating layer and legacy access bridge, not the canonical subscription product.

products.commercialNextStep: Feeds Boardroom Brief, Strategy Room, and Executive Reporting as accountable intelligence.
knownBlockers: Legacy support/admin views still import static GMI registries.
pages/intelligence/market.tsx and secondary admin/support consoles can still show fixture-derived release/call state.
Catalog still names Q1 as a product while runtime Q2 is DB-backed and published.
Tests and routes must remain future-edition-parametric for Q3 and beyond.
products.runtimeTruth: DB/snapshot-derived runtime with release authority and artifact registry.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Every edition must read persisted ledger/source/falsification/snapshot/artifact state; static files are seed-only.

products.commercialNextStep: Doctrine and evidence base supporting the product ladder.
knownBlockers: Editorial series uses an intentional curated static list; it must remain labelled as editorial curation, not live operational state.
Scheduled/public boundaries must continue to be enforced by content tests.
products.runtimeTruth: Content-derived from Contentlayer/catalogue/frontmatter, with curated editorial series as versioned editorial content.
products.sourceOfTruthDeclaration: Briefs, vault records, and editorials are content-derived surfaces; static curation is acceptable only for editorial series metadata.

crossCuttingFindings.finding: Boardroom delivery generation can persist a durable BoardroomDossier from the production-stub QUALIFYING_SPINE fixture.
crossCuttingFindings.requiredClosure: Generate boardroom delivery artifacts only from persisted order/input state and record artifact hashes/audit events.

crossCuttingFindings.finding: Living Case Fulfilment admin queue uses in-memory entitlement/order state and returns success for actions that production comments say should update Prisma.
crossCuttingFindings.requiredClosure: Persist queue state, fulfilment actions, generated artifacts, and audit records before calling the surface operational.

crossCuttingFindings.finding: Admin PDF dashboard renders synthetic interval data under a Live Data Dashboard label.
crossCuttingFindings.requiredClosure: Use real telemetry or label the component as demo/simulation.

crossCuttingFindings.finding: Quarterly GMI must continue after Q2; Q2 hardcoding is allowed only in Q2 seed/published routes, not edition authority.
crossCuttingFindings.requiredClosure: Keep edition resolver, tests, routes, and release authority parametric for Q3 and later editions.
